originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&k_crcs` is never used.

reasoning: Line 25: `k_crcs = someInt` inside `if (r)` branch. k_crcs is declared only when VERSION_CHECKING=T (L12). After the assignment at L25, k_crcs is never read — dead store. When VERSION_CHECKING=F, k_crcs is undeclared but referenced at L25 (outside #ifdef) → compile error. No '// ERROR' at L25 → new bug not in VBDB. PC = VERSION_CHECKING=T exactly matches the compilable configurations where the dead store occurs. Classification: TRUE_NEW.
